prompt_blocks.content: export function ttlForPrefix(kind: 'ephemeral_5m' | 'ephemeral_1h'): number { return kind === 'ephemeral_1h' ? 3600 : 300; } The keepalive worker should avoid refreshing one hour prefixes unless the policy explicitly enables it.
